items.name: Purple Doomspike Helmet
items.description:
Forged in the heart of a dying star, this helmet gleams with a deep, cosmic purple hue. The front is adorned with shimmering stars that seem to shift and twinkle with an otherworldly light, while menacing spikes encircle it like a crown of shadows. Those who don the Purple Doomspike Helmet command the void, their presence a testament to the infinite mysteries of the night sky.

items.name: Crimson Aristocrat Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🕯️ Commanding elegance born of midnight and wine.
This black and crimson tailcoat radiates noble dominance and dark refinement. Golden trim and rich red lapels emphasize its theatrical, vampiric charm — perfect for avatars of charisma and control.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sharp silhouette with regal gold detailing
Red and black contrast for timeless authority
Ideal for vampire, noble, or steampunk aesthetics
